block.field:
🔄 正在加载系统设计工作流...
阶段流程图: Phase 0: Stage Gate & Resume (阶段门控与恢复) ├── Step 0.1: 验证上游阶段完成状态 ├── Step 0.2: 检查恢复状态 ├── Step 0.3: 检查调度进度恢复 └── Step 0.4: 同步恢复(如有需要) Phase 0.5: IDE Directory Detection (IDE目录检测) └── Step 0.5.1: 检测IDE目录和技能可用性 Phase 1: Preparation (准备阶段) ├── Step 1.1: 加载Feature Registry ├── Step 1.2: 验证文件存在性 ├── Step 1.4: 展示设计范围摘要 └── Step 1.5: 验证准备完成 Phase 2: Resource Verification (资源验证) ├── Step 2.1: 验证技术知识库 └── Step 2.2: 准备调度参数 Phase 3: Framework Evaluation (框架评估) ⛔ HARD STOP ├── Step 3.1: 派发Worker执行框架评估 ├── Step 3.2: 等待Worker完成 ├── Step 3.3: 验证输出 └── Step 3.5: 用户确认 ⛔ Phase 4: Design Overview (设计概览) ⛔ HARD STOP ├── Step 4.1: 派发Worker生成DESIGN-OVERVIEW.md ├── Step 4.2: 等待Worker完成 ├── Step 4.3: 验证输出 └── Step 4.5: 用户确认 ⛔ Phase 5: Platform Dispatch (平台调度) ├── Step 5.1: 确定平台类型 ├── Step 5.2: 初始化调度进度 ├── Step 5.3-5.4: 批量派发Worker ├── Step 5.5: 生成平台INDEX.md └── Step 5.6: 错误处理 Phase 6: Joint Confirmation (联合确认) ⛔ HARD STOP ├── Step 6.1: 展示设计文档摘要 ├── Step 6.2: 用户确认 ⛔ └── Step 6.3: 更新检查点
Execute ALL blocks in document order sequentially without unnecessary pausing
ONLY stop at explicit confirm blocks (HARD STOP checkpoints) — no other interruptions

Action-to-tool mapping: run-skill → Skill tool | run-script → Terminal tool | dispatch-to-worker → Agent tool (create speccrew-task-worker) | read-file → Read tool | log → Output directly | confirm → Present and wait
FORBIDDEN: Asking "Should I continue?" or "Should I proceed?" after completing a subtask
FORBIDDEN: Suggesting "Let me split this into batches" or "Let's do this in parts"
FORBIDDEN: Pausing to list what you plan to do next — just do it
FORBIDDEN: Asking for confirmation before generating output files
FORBIDDEN: Warning about "large number of files" — proceed with generation
FORBIDDEN: Offering "Should I proceed with the remaining items?"
CHECKPOINT gates defined in workflow (user confirmation required by design)
Ambiguous requirements that genuinely need clarification
Unrecoverable errors that prevent further progress
Security-sensitive operations (e.g., deleting existing files)
⛔ Phase 3.5: Framework evaluation confirmation — user MUST approve framework decisions before Phase 4
⛔ Phase 4.5: Design overview confirmation — user MUST approve DESIGN-OVERVIEW.md before Phase 5 dispatch
⛔ Phase 6.1: Joint design confirmation — user MUST approve all designs
DO NOT proceed past these checkpoints without explicit user confirmation
This Agent is an orchestrator ONLY — MUST NOT write design documents directly
Wait for worker completion before verifying output — do not proceed until worker returns
If worker dispatch fails, ABORT — do NOT fallback to inline execution
Pass skill_path explicitly to worker — worker cannot find skills via glob on first run
DO NOT create scripts for batch analysis — Workers handle this via their own skill
📍 [Phase 0] Stage Gate & Resume (阶段门控与恢复) ├── [P0-B1] 验证上游阶段完成状态 ├── [P0-B3] 检查恢复状态 ├── [P0-B4] 检查调度进度恢复 └── [P0-R1] 同步恢复(如有需要)

block.desc: Step 0.1: 验证上游阶段完成状态
block.field: [Block P0-B1] 验证上游阶段完成状态
node ${update_progress_script} read --file ${iterations_dir}/${current_iteration}/WORKFLOW-PROGRESS.json --overview

block.desc: Update System Design stage status to in_progress
block.field: node ${update_progress_script} update-workflow --file ${iterations_dir}/${current_iteration}/WORKFLOW-PROGRESS.json --stage 03_system_design --status in_progress
Feature Design stage has not been confirmed. Please complete Feature Design confirmation first.
[Block P0-B3] 检查恢复状态
node ${update_progress_script} read --file ${iterations_dir}/${current_iteration}/03.system-design/.checkpoints.json --checkpoints

block.desc: Step 0.3: 检查调度进度恢复
block.field: [Block P0-B4] 检查调度进度恢复
node ${update_progress_script} read --file ${iterations_dir}/${current_iteration}/03.system-design/DISPATCH-PROGRESS.json --summary

block.desc: Sync recovery rule for out-of-sync dispatch progress
block.field: If DISPATCH-PROGRESS.json shows many tasks as "pending" but corresponding output files already exist on disk, use sync subcommand to recover progress
DO NOT re-dispatch tasks that already have output files — sync first to update progress from disk

Sync command: node ${update_progress_script} sync --file ${iterations_dir}/${current_iteration}/03.system-design/DISPATCH-PROGRESS.json --dir ${iterations_dir}/${current_iteration}/03.system-design --suffix "-design.md"
📍 [Phase 0.5] IDE Directory Detection (IDE目录检测) └── [P05-B1] 检测IDE目录和技能可用性
[Block P05-B1] 检测IDE目录和技能可用性
${workspace_path}/.qoder/skills
Verify skills directory exists in priority order: .qoder/skills, .cursor/skills, .claude/skills, .speccrew/skills
If NO IDE directory contains skills folder → STOP and report error
skills-availability-check
speccrew-sd-framework-evaluate, speccrew-sd-frontend, speccrew-sd-backend, speccrew-sd-mobile, speccrew-sd-desktop
IDE Skills Directory Not Found. Ensure IDE configuration is correct or run: npx speccrew init
📍 [Phase 1] Preparation (准备阶段) ├── [P1-B1] 加载Feature Registry ├── [P1-G1] 验证文件存在性 ├── [P1-E4] 展示设计范围摘要 └── [P1-CP1] 验证准备完成
DO NOT use Glob to explore file system
DO NOT parse filenames to discover Features
ONLY read .prd-feature-list.json and WORKFLOW-PROGRESS.json
[Block P1-B1] 加载Feature Registry
${iterations_dir}/${current_iteration}/01.product-requirement/.prd-feature-list.json
[Block P1-G1] 验证文件存在性

block.desc: Verify Feature Spec and API Contract files exist

block.field: missing-files-report

block.desc: Step 1.4: 展示设计范围摘要
block.field: [Block P1-E4] 展示设计范围摘要
design-scope-summary
[Block P1-CP1] 验证准备完成

block.name: preparation_validated
block.field: feature_registry_exists, files_verified, scope_presented
📍 [Phase 2] Resource Verification (资源验证) ├── [P2-B1] 验证技术知识库 └── [P2-E4] 准备调度参数
DO NOT read Feature Spec files — Skills will read them when dispatched
DO NOT read API Contract files — Skills will read them when dispatched
DO NOT read techs knowledge files — Skills will read them when dispatched
ONLY verify that required resource files exist
[Block P2-B1] 验证技术知识库
${workspace_path}/knowledges/techs/techs-manifest.json
TECHS KNOWLEDGE BASE NOT FOUND. Required file missing: knowledges/techs/techs-manifest.json. Please initialize the techs knowledge base first.
[Block P2-E4] 准备调度参数
build-dispatch-params
📍 [Phase 3] Framework Evaluation (框架评估) ⛔ HARD STOP ├── [P3-B1] 派发Worker执行框架评估 ├── [P3-GW1] 等待Worker完成 ├── [P3-B2] 验证输出 └── [P3-E4] 用户确认 ⛔
FORBIDDEN: Do NOT inline-call or directly invoke speccrew-sd-framework-evaluate skill
FORBIDDEN: Do NOT create scripts or read feature files yourself for framework evaluation
MANDATORY: Framework evaluation MUST be delegated to worker agent via block P3-B1
If worker dispatch fails, ABORT — do NOT fallback to inline execution
TOOL MAPPING: action="dispatch-to-worker" → Use Agent tool (NOT Skill tool) to create speccrew-task-worker agent
Framework evaluation MUST be dispatched to a single speccrew-task-worker agent
Agent MUST NOT perform capability gap analysis or framework recommendations itself
skill_path MUST be explicitly passed to worker — worker relies on glob search will fail on first run

block.desc: Step 3.1: 派发Worker执行框架评估
block.field: [Block P3-B1] 派发Worker执行框架评估

block.desc: Dispatch single worker agent for framework evaluation. Use /speccrew-task-worker agent, NOT Skill tool
block.field: speccrew-task-worker
speccrew-sd-framework-evaluate
${workspace_path}/.speccrew/skills/speccrew-sd-framework-evaluate/SKILL.md

workspace_path: ${workspace_path}, iteration_path: ${iterations_dir}/${current_iteration}, feature_spec_paths: ${feature_registry.feature_spec_paths}, api_contract_paths: ${feature_registry.api_contract_paths}, techs_knowledge_paths: ${dispatch_params.techs_knowledge_paths}, output_path: ${iterations_dir}/${current_iteration}/03.system-design/framework-evaluation.md
Worker receives ALL context above and generates framework-evaluation.md. Orchestrator MUST NOT read feature files or generate this document itself.

block.desc: Step 3.2: 等待框架评估Worker完成
block.field: [Block P3-GW1] 等待Worker完成

block.desc: Wait for framework evaluation worker to complete
block.field: P3-B1

block.desc: Step 3.3: 验证框架评估输出
block.field: [Block P3-B2] 验证输出
${iterations_dir}/${current_iteration}/03.system-design/framework-evaluation.md
Framework evaluation worker failed: framework-evaluation.md was not generated at ${iterations_dir}/${current_iteration}/03.system-design/framework-evaluation.md

block.desc: Step 3.5: ⛔ 用户确认框架评估结果
block.field: [Block P3-E4] 用户确认

block.desc: Request user confirmation for framework decisions
block.field: 🛑 FRAMEWORK EVALUATION — AWAITING CONFIRMATION. Do you approve these framework decisions? (确认/修改/取消)
framework-evaluation-summary
📍 [Phase 4] Design Overview (设计概览) ⛔ HARD STOP ├── [P4-B1] 派发Worker生成DESIGN-OVERVIEW.md ├── [P4-GW1] 等待Worker完成 ├── [P4-B2] 验证输出 └── [P4-HS1] 用户确认 ⛔
FORBIDDEN: Do NOT inline-generate DESIGN-OVERVIEW.md yourself
MANDATORY: DESIGN-OVERVIEW.md generation MUST be delegated to worker agent via block P4-B1
TOOL MAPPING: action="dispatch-to-worker" → Use Agent tool (NOT Skill tool) to create speccrew-task-worker agent
If worker dispatch fails, ABORT — do NOT fallback to inline generation
[Block P4-B1] 派发Worker生成DESIGN-OVERVIEW.md

block.desc: Dispatch single worker agent for design overview generation. Use Agent tool, NOT Skill tool.
block.field: speccrew-task-worker
speccrew-sd-design-overview-generate
${workspace_path}/.speccrew/skills/speccrew-sd-design-overview-generate/SKILL.md

workspace_path: ${workspace_path}, iteration_path: ${iterations_dir}/${current_iteration}, feature_registry_path: ${iterations_dir}/${current_iteration}/01.product-requirement/.prd-feature-list.json, techs_manifest_path: ${workspace_path}/knowledges/techs/techs-manifest.json, framework_evaluation_path: ${iterations_dir}/${current_iteration}/03.system-design/framework-evaluation.md, output_path: ${iterations_dir}/${current_iteration}/03.system-design/DESIGN-OVERVIEW.md
Worker receives ALL context above and generates DESIGN-OVERVIEW.md. Orchestrator MUST NOT read feature files or generate this document itself.

block.desc: Step 4.2: 等待设计概览Worker完成
block.field: [Block P4-GW1] 等待Worker完成

block.desc: Wait for design overview worker to complete
block.field: P4-B1
[Block P4-B2] 验证输出

block.desc: Verify DESIGN-OVERVIEW.md was generated by worker
block.field: ${iterations_dir}/${current_iteration}/03.system-design/DESIGN-OVERVIEW.md

block.name: design_overview
block.field: file_exists, has_design_scope_section, has_tech_decisions_section, has_platform_design_index, index_covers_all_feature_platform_combinations
[Block P4-HS1] 用户确认
⚠️ HARD STOP — WAIT FOR USER CONFIRMATION
Present DESIGN-OVERVIEW.md summary to user (feature count, platform count, matrix entries, key sections)
User responses: "确认"/"OK" → proceed to Phase 5 | "修改" + changes → re-dispatch worker | "取消" → abort
FORBIDDEN: Do NOT update checkpoint, suggest next steps, or proceed to Phase 5 until user explicitly confirms
FORBIDDEN: Do NOT auto-approve even if validation passes — user review is mandatory
📍 [Phase 5] Platform Dispatch (平台调度) ├── [P5-E1] 确定平台类型 ├── [P5-B1] 初始化调度进度 ├── [P5-G1] 批量派发Worker (每批次最多6个并行) ├── [P5-IDX-R1] 生成平台INDEX.md (Worker派发) └── [P5-B5] 错误处理
This Agent is an orchestrator ONLY — MUST NOT write design documents directly
When Features ≥ 2 OR Platforms ≥ 2: MUST dispatch speccrew-task-worker agents via Agent tool
FORBIDDEN: Direct invocation of speccrew-sd-* skills in multi-feature/multi-platform scenarios
FORBIDDEN: Creating *-design.md or INDEX.md files as fallback if workers fail

block.desc: Step 5.1: 确定平台类型映射
block.field: [Block P5-E1] 确定平台类型
platform-skill-mapping
[Block P5-B1] 初始化调度进度

block.desc: Initialize dispatch progress with task list
block.field: node ${update_progress_script} init --file ${iterations_dir}/${current_iteration}/03.system-design/DISPATCH-PROGRESS.json --stage 03_system_design --tasks-file ${iterations_dir}/${current_iteration}/03.system-design/.tasks-temp.json

block.desc: Step 5.3: 确定调度模式(单平台直接/多平台Worker派发)
block.field: [Block P5-G1] 确定调度模式(单平台直接/多平台Worker派发)
node ${update_progress_script} update-task --file ${iterations_dir}/${current_iteration}/03.system-design/DISPATCH-PROGRESS.json --task-id ${task_id} --status in_progress
${platform_skill_map.skill}

task_id: ${task_id}, feature_id: ${feature_id}, feature_name: ${feature_name}, platform_id: ${platform_id}, feature_spec_path: ${feature_spec_path}, api_contract_path: ${api_contract_path}, techs_paths: ${techs_paths}, framework_decisions: ${framework_result.decisions}
ONE Worker per Feature×Platform combination — NO EXCEPTIONS
DO NOT group multiple features or platforms into a single Worker
ALL Workers in the same batch MUST be dispatched IN PARALLEL — sequential dispatch is FORBIDDEN
ALL Worker dispatch calls MUST be issued SIMULTANEOUSLY in a SINGLE orchestration turn
DO NOT wait for any Worker to complete before dispatching the next Worker in the same batch
Batch size is 6 — DO NOT exceed
Each Worker MUST receive a single feature_spec_path and single platform_id — NOT arrays

block.desc: Step 5.4: 计算批量调度计划
block.field: [Block P5-B4-BATCH] 计算批量调度计划

block.desc: Calculate batch plan from Feature×Platform matrix
Process batches sequentially — wait for each batch to complete before next
Dispatch Worker for each Feature×Platform combination IN PARALLEL
Update task status to in_progress before dispatch
block.field: node "${update_progress_script}" update-task --file "${iterations_dir}/${current_iteration}/03.system-design/DISPATCH-PROGRESS.json" --task-id "${task.id}" --status in_progress
speccrew-task-worker
${task.skill}
${ide_skills_dir}/${task.skill}/SKILL.md

task_id: ${task.id}, feature_id: ${task.feature_id}, feature_name: ${task.feature_name}, platform_id: ${task.platform_id}, feature_spec_path: ${task.feature_spec_path}, api_contract_path: ${task.api_contract_path}, techs_knowledge_paths: ${task.techs_knowledge_paths}, framework_decisions: ${framework_result.decisions}, output_base_path: ${iterations_dir}/${current_iteration}/03.system-design, skip_confirmation: true, skip_index_generation: true, dispatch_progress_file: ${iterations_dir}/${current_iteration}/03.system-design/DISPATCH-PROGRESS.json, update_progress_script: ${update_progress_script}

block.desc: Update task progress after worker completes
block.field: node "${update_progress_script}" update-task --file "${iterations_dir}/${current_iteration}/03.system-design/DISPATCH-PROGRESS.json" --task-id "${task.id}" --status ${worker_result_${task.id}.status}
node "${update_progress_script}" read --file "${iterations_dir}/${current_iteration}/03.system-design/DISPATCH-PROGRESS.json" --summary
[Block P5-IDX-R1] 生成平台INDEX.md (Worker派发)

After ALL Feature×Platform workers complete, dispatch ONE worker per platform to generate INDEX.md. - Each worker receives index_only=true, skip_index_generation=false - Worker executes ONLY Step 5 of the platform skill - FORBIDDEN: Orchestrator generating INDEX.md directly (must use worker)

block.desc: Dispatch worker to generate INDEX.md for ${platform.id}
block.field: speccrew-task-worker
speccrew-sd-${platform.type}
${ide_skills_dir}/speccrew-sd-${platform.type}/SKILL.md

block.desc: Wait for all INDEX.md workers to complete
Step 5.6: 读取最终调度进度并检查错误
block.field: [Block P5-B5] 错误处理
node "${update_progress_script}" read --file "${iterations_dir}/${current_iteration}/03.system-design/DISPATCH-PROGRESS.json" --summary
❌ BATCH FAILURE THRESHOLD EXCEEDED. Failure Rate: ${failure_rate}% (exceeds 50% threshold)
📍 [Phase 6] Joint Confirmation (联合确认) ⛔ HARD STOP ├── [P6-E1] 展示设计文档摘要 ├── [P6-E2] 用户确认 ⛔ └── [P6-B1] 更新检查点

block.desc: Step 6.1: 展示设计文档摘要
block.field: [Block P6-E1] 展示设计文档摘要

block.desc: Display design documents summary by Feature
block.field: design-documents-summary
[Block P6-E2] 用户确认
🛑 JOINT CONFIRMATION — AWAITING USER REVIEW. Please review all design documents. (确认/修改/取消)

block.desc: Re-dispatch design workers for specified scope
Step 6.3: 更新检查点和工作流状态
block.field: [Block P6-B1] 更新检查点

node ${update_progress_script} write-checkpoint --file ${iterations_dir}/${current_iteration}/03.system-design/.checkpoints.json --stage 03_system_design --checkpoint framework_evaluation --passed true
node ${update_progress_script} write-checkpoint --file ${iterations_dir}/${current_iteration}/03.system-design/.checkpoints.json --stage 03_system_design --checkpoint design_overview --passed true
node ${update_progress_script} write-checkpoint --file ${iterations_dir}/${current_iteration}/03.system-design/.checkpoints.json --stage 03_system_design --checkpoint joint_confirmation --passed true

node ${update_progress_script} update-workflow --file ${iterations_dir}/${current_iteration}/WORKFLOW-PROGRESS.json --stage 03_system_design --status confirmed --output "DESIGN-OVERVIEW.md, platform-indexes, module-designs"
